category_sources: source_facts.description says Regularized Greedy Forest library; official RGF-team/rgf repository describes the RGF library and wrappers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rgf; official repository and CRAN package documentation use RGF for Regularized Greedy Forest.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; no dedicated docs site was identified, so the README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/RGF-team/rgf; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the RGF library; official repository materials describe original and multithreaded implementations plus language wrappers.
